payload.title: 2025 Metro-North Railroad Committee Work Plan
payload.description: Metro-North Railroad Committee Work Plan for 2025 listing recurring agenda items, anticipated action items, and anticipated information items by month.

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

payload.description: Committee of the MTA Board overseeing Metro-North Railroad operations, performance, and policy.
MTA Police will highlight the significant police activities incurred during the month reported.
Responsible for Grand Central Terminal retail development, leasing, construction opportunities, and financial and marketing information.

The Key Performance Metrics book provides the MTA Board and members of the public with a comprehensive overview of monthly LIRR and Metro-North performance indicators including ridership, financial results, train performance, capital project progress, community events, and safety and security.
A monthly report will be provided highlighting major accomplishments and progress on key initiatives and performance indicators.
A monthly report will be given highlighting key operating performance statistics and indicators.
A monthly report will be provided highlighting key safety performance statistics and indicators.
MTA Police will highlight the significant police activities incurred during the month reported.
A monthly report will be provided that compares the Railroad's actual financial performance against its budget and/or forecast.

The Agency will present its revised 2025 Financial Plan. These plans will reflect the 2025 Adopted Budget and an updated Financial Plan for 2025 reflecting the out-year impact of any changes incorporated into the 2025 Adopted Budget.
A review of the prior year's performance of railroad service through the end of calendar year 2024 will be provided to the Committee.
Annual report to the Committee on system-wide reliability and availability for elevators and escalators throughout the system.

A quarterly report to the Committee providing data on key Equal Employment Opportunity (EEO) and Human Resources indicators relating to MNR's EEO and Diversity efforts, such as composition of the agency's workforce, new hires, and discrimination complaints.
A report will be presented to the Committee on Metro-North's ridership trends during 2024 based on monthly ticket sales data and the results of train ridership counts conducted by Metro-North.

tool_args.label: Final Review of 2024 Operating Budget Results - May 2025

payload.description: A review of the prior year's budget results and their implications for current and future budget performance will be presented to the Committee.
payload.event_name: Final Review of 2024 Operating Budget Results

payload.description: A quarterly report to the Committee providing data on key Equal Employment Opportunity (EEO) and Human Resources indicators relating to MNR's EEO and Diversity efforts, such as composition of the agency's workforce, new hires, and discrimination complaints.

tool_args.label: Grand Central Terminal Retail Development - July 2025

payload.description: MTA Real Estate will provide an annual report on leasing and construction opportunities and financial and marketing information related to retail development in Grand Central Terminal.
payload.event_name: Grand Central Terminal Retail Development Mid-Year Operations Update

payload.description: Public comment will be accepted on the 2026 Budget.
The agency will provide the 2025 Mid-Year Forecast financial information for revenue and expense by month.

A quarterly report to the Committee providing data on key Equal Employment Opportunity (EEO) and Human Resources indicators relating to MNR's EEO and Diversity efforts, such as composition of the agency's workforce, new hires, and discrimination complaints.
Public comment will be accepted on the 2026 Budget.
The Committee Chair will present a draft Metro-North Committee Work Plan for 2026 that will address initiatives to be reported throughout the year.
The Committee will recommend action to the Board on the Final Proposed Budget for 2026.

tool_args.label: Approval of 2026 Committee Work Plan - December 2025

payload.description: The Committee will approve the Proposed Metro-North Railroad Committee Work Plan for 2026 that will address initiatives to be reported on throughout the year.

A quarterly report to the Committee providing data on key Equal Employment Opportunity (EEO) and Human Resources indicators relating to MNR's EEO and Diversity efforts, such as composition of the agency's workforce, new hires, and discrimination complaints.

tool_args.label: Approval of 2025 Committee Work Plan - January 2025

payload.description: The Committee will approve the Proposed Metro-North Railroad Committee Work Plan for 2025 that will address initiatives to be reported on throughout the year.
Annual review and approval of the MNR Committee Charter.

payload.claim_text: The Key Performance Metrics book provides the MTA Board and members of the public with a comprehensive overview of monthly LIRR and Metro-North performance indicators including ridership, financial results, train performance, capital project progress, community events, and safety and security.
payload.description: Definition of the Key Performance Metrics report scope for LIRR and Metro-North.

payload.claim_text: List of procurement action items requiring Board approval. The Non-Competitive items will be first, followed by the Competitive items and then the Ratifications. The list will include items that need a 2/3 vote of the Board for approval.
payload.description: Description of procurement agenda item structure for MNR Committee meetings.

tool_args.label: MNR Committee has recurring KPM report
MTA Police presents Police Report to MNR Committee
MTA Real Estate presents GCT Retail Development report

payload.description: The Committee Chair will request a motion to approve the minutes of the prior month's meeting.
The Work Plan will list, by month, the topics anticipated to be presented to the Committee for action or for information. The Committee will be advised if any changes have been made to the plan.
Materials presented to the Committee for review pertaining to certain agency initiatives and functions.
Staff summary documents presented to the Board for approval of items affecting business standards and practices.
A monthly report will be provided that compares the Railroad's actual financial performance against its budget and/or forecast.

List of procurement action items requiring Board approval. The Non-Competitive items will be first, followed by the Competitive items and then the Ratifications. The list will include items that need a 2/3 vote of the Board for approval.

tool_args.label: MNR Committee has Approval of Minutes
